body_txt: The sudden eruption of an enraged individual's head into that of a fauxdemonic monster many times its normal size, with bulging eyes, wagging tongue, pointed ears and teeth, and sometimes jets of steam or flame from its nostrils. Usually expected to cow the viewer into defeat or submission; usually does not work. Rushing up to someone and getting in their face in a confrontational manner can have a similar effect. Compare with Demonic Head Shake , Scary Flashlight Face , Game Face , Burning with Anger and Looming Silhouette of Rage . Close relative of Nightmare Face . Also see Comical Angry Face , where the character's head usually stays at a relatively normal size but still includes fangs or otherwise distorted teeth and bulging eyes. Not to be confused with "the Demon's Head" . Or Clash at Demonhead . Or Succubi and Incubi .
